Approaches (Discharge): Feeding tube CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether a feeding tube was performed in the last three days of the resident's stay at the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
920 ALTRD_DIET_ADMSN_CD ALTRD_DIET_ADMSN_CD K0520C1 Nutritional Approaches (Admission): Mech Alt Diet CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident performed a mechanically altered diet days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility.
